name: Podcasts
description: Manage podcast subscriptions with automatic RSS feed updates, episode downloads, auto-delete after listening, and daily auto-playlist generation.
overview: Subscribe to podcast RSS feeds, automatically download new episodes, manage auto-deletion of listened content, and generate a daily auto-playlist of unlistened episodes.
changelog:
- Alpha release
- RSS feed subscription management
- Configurable update frequency (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Auto-download of new episodes (latest 10 per podcast)
- Cover image extraction as folder.jpg (only once, skip if exists)
- Auto-delete after 2 days of listening (default)
- Daily auto-playlist generation via IPlaylistManager API (database-backed)
- Manual feed update buttons
- Manual playlist generation button
- Manual delete listened episodes button (red styling)
- Podcast detection via playback events
- Podcast folder named 'Podcasts' (with auto-migration from lowercase)
- Episode naming: YYYY-MM-DD-EpisodeName.ext
- ID3/metadata tags: Title, Artist, Album Artist, Album, Year, Genre
- Existing episodes auto-tagged on first feed update (one-time per feed)
- 2-second delay between metadata writes to prevent server overload
